name: bridgehead
description: Break the loop — deliver GitHub and Gmail events into local Codex threads in near real time, configured conversationally.

interface.shortDescription: Push GitHub and Gmail events into your Codex threads
interface.longDescription: Break the loop: instead of agents polling on a timer, bridgehead runs a small local daemon that receives GitHub webhooks (via a smee.io relay by default) and Gmail messages (IMAP IDLE), matches them against routes you define in conversation, and injects them as new turns into the Codex threads you choose. Includes a delivery log, replay, dedup, signature verification, and conservative sandbox defaults.
